data.body: RESUME gnu-whale-ichor (e68d) TRANSITION execution via /rebar-implement. Prior session diverged 4 leaves from approved epic ACs; user rejected; 4 transition stories filed. Executing TS1(c96d authorship->in-toto)->TS2(09f9 key-validity->git-commit-ancestry, SECURITY-CRITICAL)->TS3(117b ledger schema+key_not_valid_at_era verdict)->TS4(b134 docs). Each AMENDS its mid-stack Gerrit change (bde5=561, e165=563, 3183=580, 4b5b=581), NOT new changes; keeps Change-Id; per-patchset must be green. Basing on existing Gerrit stack (NOT landed main) per user instruction. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-identity @ identity-epic (8-commit stack on b3a65ce2d). Held-out TDD per story. review-plan --ref HEAD (stacked deps unmerged). All gates ON. Epic already in_progress this session.
